name: plan dry run
prompt: Plan the OCUDU build in .local/ocudu and show me the commands before making changes.

name: build explicit tag
prompt: Clone srsRAN Project at a specific tag and build it in the local OCUDU workspace.

name: bootstrap deps
prompt: Prepare the documented Ubuntu dependencies and then build the project under .local/ocudu.

name: zeromq build
prompt: Configure the build for a local ZeroMQ-friendly workflow and keep the plan reproducible.

name: not host audit
prompt: Check whether this workstation is missing FFTW or SCTP development packages.

name: not smoke validation
prompt: Run post-build smoke checks and verify that gnb --help works.

name: not packaging
prompt: Review these scratch notes and promote them into a tracked skill.

name: not production claim
prompt: Turn this build plan into a production deployment guide for carrier-grade RU interoperability.
notes: Out of scope for this skill.
